original_image_tags: A stamped "C O P Y" at top left, with two dark circular punch holes below it. A red "SECRET" stamp is at top center.
A red "SECRET" stamp at the bottom center, with a single horizontal line struck through it.

elements.description: Page contains typed text of a military document (1949) regarding a 'Flying Disc' sighting. Visual elements are limited to two red 'SECRET' stamps (top and bottom, with the bottom one crossed out), two black punch holes at the top, and the typed page number '3' at the bottom center.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of two red 'SECRET' stamps (top and bottom, with the bottom one crossed out) and two black punch holes at the top, but Description A adds a stamped 'COPY' and a struck-through line not mentioned in Description B, which is an omission rather than a contradiction.
